items.question: Platform apa saja yang didukung Media Tools?
items.answer: Saat ini Media Tools mendukung TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, dan Threads untuk unduhan konten publik.

items.question: Kenapa proses unduhan terkadang gagal?
items.answer: Biasanya karena link tidak valid, konten privat, atau server sumber sedang membatasi akses sementara.

items.question: Di mana file hasil unduhan disimpan?
items.answer: File otomatis disimpan ke folder Media Tools di perangkat Anda. Lokasinya menyesuaikan platform dan izin yang diberikan.

items.question: Apakah saya bisa memilih format MP3/MP4?
items.answer: Ya, untuk platform yang mendukung, Anda bisa memilih format MP4 video atau MP3 audio sebelum mengunduh.

items.question: Apakah aplikasi ini gratis digunakan?
items.answer: Ya, fitur utama Media Tools dapat digunakan secara gratis untuk kebutuhan personal.

en.title: Help
en.subtitle: Quick answers for the most frequently asked questions.
en.activeHelpDescription: Check the quick guide before contacting support.
en.needMoreHelpDescription: If the answer you need is not available yet, contact our team for direct assistance.

items.question: Which platforms are supported by Media Tools?
items.answer: Currently, Media Tools supports TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and Threads for public content downloads.

items.question: Why does the download process sometimes fail?
items.answer: Usually due to invalid links, private content, or temporary access restrictions from the source server.

items.question: Where are downloaded files stored?
items.answer: Files are automatically saved to the Media Tools folder on your device. The exact location depends on platform and granted permissions.

items.question: Can I choose MP3/MP4 format?
items.answer: Yes, for supported platforms, you can choose MP4 video or MP3 audio format before downloading.

items.question: Is this app free to use?
items.answer: Yes, Media Tools core features are free to use for personal needs.

id.aboutDescription: Media Tools adalah solusi lengkap untuk mengunduh konten media dari berbagai platform sosial media populer. Kami menyediakan akses cepat, aman, dan tanpa biaya untuk menyimpan video, foto, dan musik favorit Anda dalam kualitas terbaik.
id.featureFastDesc: Server berkecepatan tinggi untuk hasil instan.
id.featureSecureDesc: Data Anda diproses dengan fokus pada privasi pengguna.
id.featureHdDesc: Mendukung resolusi tinggi sesuai sumber yang tersedia.
id.featureMultiPlatformDesc: Satu alat untuk berbagai platform sosial media.
id.copyright: 2026 Media Tools. Seluruh Hak Cipta Dilindungi.

en.aboutDescription: Media Tools is a complete solution for downloading media content from popular social platforms. We provide fast, secure, and free access to save your favorite videos, photos, and music in the best available quality.
en.featureSecureDesc: Your data is processed with user privacy in mind.
en.featureHdDesc: Supports high resolution based on available sources.
en.featureMultiPlatformDesc: One tool for various social media platforms.

id.subtitle: Data Anda adalah prioritas utama kami.
id.safeSystemDesc: Semua protokol enkripsi aktif dan berjalan normal.
id.noTrackingDesc: Kami tidak melacak aktivitas browsing Anda di luar aplikasi Media Tools.
id.localStorageDesc: Riwayat unduhan disimpan secara lokal di perangkat Anda, bukan di server kami.

faqItems.question: Apakah Media Tools menyimpan file saya?
faqItems.answer: Tidak. File diunduh langsung ke storage Anda dan tidak disimpan di server Media Tools.

faqItems.question: Bagaimana dengan data login sosial media?
faqItems.answer: Media Tools tidak menyimpan kredensial login Anda. Proses autentikasi dikelola langsung oleh platform resmi terkait.

id.exportInfoTitle: Data Anda tersimpan di penyimpanan perangkat
id.exportInfoBody: Jika Anda menghapus aplikasi atau membersihkan data aplikasi, data ini bisa ikut terhapus.

en.subtitle: Your data is our top priority.
en.safeSystemDesc: All encryption protocols are active and running normally.
en.noTrackingDesc: We do not track your browsing activity outside the Media Tools app.
en.localStorageDesc: Download history is stored locally on your device, not on our servers.
en.aes256Desc: Data encryption standard for stored data.

faqItems.question: Does Media Tools store my files?
faqItems.answer: No. Files are downloaded directly to your storage and are not kept on Media Tools servers.

faqItems.question: What about social media login data?
faqItems.answer: Media Tools does not store your login credentials. Authentication is handled directly by each official platform.

en.exportInfoTitle: Your data is stored in device storage
en.exportInfoBody: If you uninstall the app or clear app data, this data may be removed.

id.description: Untuk memberikan pengalaman terbaik, Media Tools memerlukan akses ke beberapa fitur perangkat Anda. Privasi Anda adalah prioritas kami.
id.storageDesc: Akses penyimpanan perangkat untuk menyimpan hasil unduhan langsung ke galeri Anda.
id.cameraDesc: Digunakan untuk fitur perekaman video dan filter AR di pemutar media internal.
id.microphoneDesc: Diperlukan untuk perekaman audio, pemrosesan suara, dan stabilisasi konversi format.
id.filesDesc: Izin untuk mengakses dan mengelola berkas Anda untuk konversi dokumen dan penggantian nama massal.

en.description: To provide the best experience, Media Tools requires access to several device features. Your privacy is our priority.
en.storageDesc: Access your device storage to save downloaded content directly to your gallery.
en.cameraDesc: Used for video recording features and AR filters within the internal media player.
en.microphoneDesc: Required for audio recording, voice processing, and format conversion stabilization.
en.filesDesc: Permission to access and manage your files for document conversion and batch renaming.

id.description: Kami memerlukan izin Anda agar fitur aplikasi dapat berjalan dengan optimal.

en.description: We need your permission so app features can run optimally.

id.eWalletStepsConfirm: Scan QR code dan konfirmasi nominal donasi.

steps.text: Buka aplikasi myBCA / m-BCA / ATM BCA.
Pilih menu Transfer > ke Virtual Account / e-Wallet.
Pilih tujuan GoPay (jika ada) atau masukkan kode sesuai petunjuk di aplikasi bank.
Masukkan nomor GoPay:
Masukkan nominal donasi sesuai yang tertera.
Periksa detail, lalu konfirmasi dan selesaikan transaksi.
Buka BRImo / Internet Banking / ATM BRI.
Pilih menu Pembayaran / e-Wallet / BRIVA.
Pilih atau cari tujuan GoPay.
Masukkan nomor GoPay:
Isi nominal donasi, lalu lanjutkan hingga pembayaran berhasil.
Buka aplikasi BNI Mobile Banking atau gunakan ATM BNI.
Pilih menu e-Wallet / Pembayaran.
Pilih tujuan GoPay bila tersedia.
Masukkan nomor GoPay:
Masukkan jumlah donasi dan konfirmasi transaksi.
Buka Livin' by Mandiri atau ATM Mandiri.
Pilih menu Bayar / e-Wallet.
Pilih GoPay sebagai tujuan.
Masukkan nomor GoPay:
Isi nominal donasi dan selesaikan pembayaran.
Buka aplikasi mobile banking / internet banking / ATM bank kamu.
Cari menu e-Wallet / Dompet Digital / Virtual Account.
Pilih tujuan GoPay bila tersedia.
Masukkan nomor GoPay:
Isi nominal donasi lalu lanjutkan hingga transaksi berhasil.

en.eWalletStepsConfirm: Scan the QR code and confirm the donation amount.

steps.text: Open myBCA / m-BCA / BCA ATM.
Select Transfer > to Virtual Account / e-Wallet.
Choose GoPay destination (if available) or enter the code shown in your banking app.
Enter GoPay number:
Enter the donation amount shown.
Review details, then confirm and complete the transaction.
Open BRImo / Internet Banking / BRI ATM.
Select Payment / e-Wallet / BRIVA menu.
Choose or search for GoPay destination.
Enter GoPay number:
Fill in donation amount, then continue until payment succeeds.
Open BNI Mobile Banking app or use BNI ATM.
Select e-Wallet / Payment menu.
Select GoPay destination if available.
Enter GoPay number:
Enter donation amount and confirm transaction.
Open Livin' by Mandiri or Mandiri ATM.
Select Pay / e-Wallet menu.
Choose GoPay as destination.
Enter GoPay number:
Enter donation amount and complete payment.
Open your mobile banking / internet banking / ATM app.
Find e-Wallet / Digital Wallet / Virtual Account menu.
Select GoPay destination if available.
Enter GoPay number:
Enter donation amount, then continue until transaction succeeds.
